content:
# Review

## Outcome

**Approved**

## Evidence

- Reviewed src/contexts/agent_execution/model.rs:241-246; TokenCounts now includes cache_read_tokens and cache_creation_tokens, and all concrete TokenCounts struct literals were updated accordingly.
- Reviewed src/adapters/process_backend.rs:181-198 and src/adapters/process_backend.rs:1286-1323; Claude envelope usage is mapped into TokenCounts, and Codex stdout scanning restores input/output/cached token counts from the last usage-bearing NDJSON event.
- Reviewed src/adapters/openrouter_backend.rs:299-312 and src/adapters/openrouter_backend.rs:500-506; OpenRouter usage now passes through Anthropic cache fields and OpenAI prompt_tokens_details.cached_tokens into TokenCounts.
- Reviewed src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:262-277; successful invocations now emit structured tracing::info! with invocation_id, backend, model, attempt, duration_ms, token fields, presence booleans, and session_reused after metadata finalization.
- Validation passed with cargo test (329 lib tests, 128 cli tests, 1 run_attach_tmux test, 667 unit tests, 0 doc-test failures).
- Validation passed with cargo clippy -- -D warnings and cargo fmt --check.

## Findings and Gaps

None identified.

## Follow-up and Amendments

None.
